tEn: RVT: Robotic View Transformer for 3D Object Manipulation
tZh: RVT：用于3D物体操作的机器人视角变换器
sEn: RVT achieves 26% higher success than state-of-the-art, trains 36x faster, and works across 18 tasks with few real-world demos.
sZh: RVT比现有最优方法成功率提高26%，训练速度快36倍，仅需少量真实演示即可完成18种任务。
absEn: For 3D object manipulation, methods that build an explicit 3D representation perform better than those relying only on camera images. But using explicit 3D representations like voxels comes at large computing cost, adversely affecting scalability. In this work, we propose RVT, a multi-view transformer for 3D manipulation that is both scalable and accurate. Some key features of RVT are an attention mechanism to aggregate information across views and re-rendering of the camera input from virtual views around the robot workspace. In simulations, we find that a single RVT model works well across 18 RLBench tasks with 249 task variations, achieving 26% higher relative success than the existing state-of-the-art method (PerAct). It also trains 36X faster than PerAct for achieving the same performance and achieves 2.3X the inference speed of PerAct. Further, RVT can perform a variety of manipulation tasks in the real world with just a few ($\sim$10) demonstrations per task. Visual results, code, and trained model are provided at https://robotic-view-transformer.github.io/.
absZh: 对于3D物体操作，构建显式3D表示的方法比仅依赖相机图像的方法表现更好。但使用体素等显式3D表示会带来巨大的计算成本，影响可扩展性。在这项工作中，我们提出了RVT，一种用于3D操作的多视角变换器，兼具可扩展性和准确性。RVT的关键特性包括一种跨视角聚合信息的注意力机制，以及从机器人工作空间周围的虚拟视角重新渲染相机输入。在仿真中，我们发现单个RVT模型在18个RLBench任务（含249个任务变体）上表现良好，相对成功率比现有最先进方法（PerAct）高出26%。在达到相同性能的情况下，其训练速度比PerAct快36倍，推理速度是PerAct的2.3倍。此外，RVT在现实世界中仅需每个任务少量（约10个）演示即可执行多种操作任务。视觉结果、代码和训练模型可在https://robotic-view-transformer.github.io/获取。

contrib.en: Proposes RVT, a multi-view transformer for 3D object manipulation that is both scalable and accurate.
contrib.zh: 提出RVT，一种用于3D物体操作的多视角Transformer，兼具可扩展性和准确性。

contrib.en: Achieves 26% higher relative success than PerAct on 18 RLBench tasks with 249 variations.
contrib.zh: 在18个RLBench任务（249种变体）上，相对成功率比PerAct高26%。

contrib.en: Trains 36X faster and achieves 2.3X inference speed compared to PerAct.
contrib.zh: 训练速度比PerAct快36倍，推理速度快2.3倍。

contrib.en: Demonstrates real-world manipulation with only ~10 demonstrations per task.
contrib.zh: 在真实世界中，每个任务仅需约10次演示即可完成操作。

contrib.en: Introduces re-rendering from virtual views to decouple sensor images from transformer input.
contrib.zh: 引入从虚拟视角重新渲染，将传感器图像与Transformer输入解耦。

contrib.en: Investigates design choices like separate processing of image tokens before joint attention.
contrib.zh: 研究了设计选择，例如在联合注意力之前单独处理图像令牌。

limits.en: Requires calibration of camera-to-robot extrinsics, limiting portability.
limits.zh: 需要标定相机到机器人的外参，限制了可移植性。

limits.en: Struggles with sparse or noisy point clouds, e.g., marker tasks.
limits.zh: 在稀疏或噪声点云（如标记任务）上表现不佳。

limits.en: View specification is manually chosen and not optimized or learned from data.
limits.zh: 视角规格是手动选择的，未从数据中优化或学习。

limits.en: Evaluated only on a limited set of 5 real-world tasks with 51 demonstrations.
limits.zh: 仅在5个真实世界任务（51次演示）的有限集合上评估。

limits.en: Assumes a low-level motion planner and controller for action execution.
limits.zh: 假设存在低级运动规划器和控制器来执行动作。

items.en: For 3D object manipulation, methods that build an explicit 3D representation perform better than those relying only on camera images. But using explicit 3D representations like voxels comes at large computing cost, adversely affecting scalability. In this work, we propose RVT, a multi-view transformer for 3D manipulation that is both scalable and accurate. Some key features of RVT are an attention mechanism to aggregate information across views and re-rendering of the camera input from virtual views around the robot workspace. In simulations, we find that a single RVT model works well across 18 RLBench tasks with 249 task variations, achieving 26%percent2626\% higher relative success than the existing state-of-the-art method (PerAct). It also trains 36X faster than PerAct for achieving the same performance and achieves 2.3X the inference speed of PerAct. Further, RVT can perform a variety of manipulation tasks in the real world with just a few (∼similar-to\sim10) demonstrations per task. Visual results, code, and trained model are provided at: https://robotic-view-transformer.github.io/.
items.zh: 对于3D物体操作，构建显式3D表示的方法比仅依赖相机图像的方法表现更好。但使用体素等显式3D表示会带来巨大的计算成本，不利于可扩展性。在这项工作中，我们提出了RVT，一种用于3D操作的多视图Transformer，既具有可扩展性又具有准确性。RVT的一些关键特性包括：一种跨视图聚合信息的注意力机制，以及从机器人工作空间周围的虚拟视图重新渲染相机输入。在仿真中，我们发现单个RVT模型在18个RLBench任务（249个任务变体）上表现良好，相对成功率比现有最先进方法（PerAct）高出26%。在达到相同性能的情况下，其训练速度比PerAct快36倍，推理速度是PerAct的2.3倍。此外，RVT只需每个任务少量（约10个）演示即可在现实世界中执行各种操作任务。视觉结果、代码和训练模型可在以下网址获取：https://robotic-view-transformer.github.io/。

items.en: Keywords: 3D Manipulation, Multi-View, Transformer
items.zh: 关键词：3D操作，多视图，Transformer

items.en: A fundamental goal of robot learning is to build systems that can solve various manipulation tasks in unconstrained 3D settings. A popular class of learning methods directly processes image(s) viewed from single or multiple cameras. These view-based methods have achieved impressive success on a variety of pick-and-place and object rearrangement tasks [1, 2, 3, 4]. However, their success on tasks that require 3D reasoning has been limited. As shown by James et al. [5] and Shridhar et al. [6], view-based methods struggle at 3D manipulation tasks on RLBench [7] with less than 2% success.
items.zh: 机器人学习的一个基本目标是构建能够在无约束3D环境中解决各种操作任务的系统。一类流行的学习方法直接处理来自单个或多个相机的图像。这些基于视图的方法在各种抓取放置和物体重排任务上取得了令人瞩目的成功[1, 2, 3, 4]。然而，它们在需要3D推理的任务上的成功有限。如James等人[5]和Shridhar等人[6]所示，基于视图的方法在RLBench[7]上的3D操作任务中表现不佳，成功率低于2%。

items.capEn: Figure 1: RVT scales and performs better than PerAct on RLBench, achieving on-par performance in 36X less time (same hardware), and 1.26X peak performance.
items.capZh: 图1：RVT在RLBench上的扩展性和性能均优于PerAct，在36倍更短的时间内达到同等性能（相同硬件），峰值性能提升1.26倍。

items.en: To address this, methods have been proposed that reason with explicit 3D representations of the scene. C2F-ARM [5] represents the scene with multi-resolution voxels and achieves strong performance on difficult RLBench tasks. PerAct [6] improves upon C2F-ARM in behavior cloning by using perceiver transformer [8] to process voxels. However, creating and reasoning over voxels comes at a higher computing cost compared to reasoning over images, since the number of voxels scales cubicly with the resolution as opposed to squarely for image pixels. This makes voxel-based methods less scalable compared to their view-based counterparts. In fact, training PerAct on 18 RLBench tasks takes 16 days using 8 V100 GPUs (3072 GPU hours). This hinders fast development and prototyping. Moreover, such computing requirements become even more prohibitive when scaling to larger datasets with more tasks and diversity.
items.zh: 为了解决这个问题，研究人员提出了使用显式3D场景表示的方法。C2F-ARM[5]使用多分辨率体素表示场景，在困难的RLBench任务上取得了强劲性能。PerAct[6]通过使用感知器Transformer[8]处理体素，在行为克隆方面改进了C2F-ARM。然而，与基于图像的方法相比，创建和推理体素的计算成本更高，因为体素数量随分辨率呈立方增长，而图像像素呈平方增长。这使得基于体素的方法在可扩展性上不如基于视图的方法。事实上，在8个V100 GPU上训练PerAct完成18个RLBench任务需要16天（3072 GPU小时）。这阻碍了快速开发和原型设计。此外，当扩展到包含更多任务和多样性的更大数据集时，这种计算需求变得更加难以承受。

items.en: Hence, a key question is – can we build a manipulation network that not only performs well but also inherits the scalability of view-based methods? To this end, we propose RVT (Robotic View Transformer) that significantly outperforms the SOTA voxel-based method both in terms of success rate and training time, as shown in Fig. 1. With the same hardware, RVT achieves the peak performance of PerAct in 36X less time, decreasing the training time from 14 days to just 10 hours. Apart from being much faster to train, RVT also achieves a 26% higher success rate than PerAct, averaged over 18 tasks (249 task variations) on RLBench. RVT outperforms PerAct on 88.9% of tasks on RLBench while achieving 2.3X the inference speed (11.6 vs 4.9 fps). Further, we find that RVT also works well in the real world, where with only 51 demonstrations, a single RVT model can learn to perform a variety of manipulation tasks (5 tasks, 13 variations) like opening a drawer, placing objects on a shelf, pressing hand sanitizer, and stacking objects (see Fig. 4).
items.zh: 因此，一个关键问题是——我们能否构建一个不仅性能优异，而且继承基于视图方法可扩展性的操作网络？为此，我们提出了RVT（机器人视图Transformer），它在成功率和训练时间上均显著优于最先进的基于体素的方法，如图1所示。在相同硬件上，RVT在36倍更短的时间内达到PerAct的峰值性能，将训练时间从14天缩短至仅10小时。除了训练速度更快，RVT在RLBench的18个任务（249个任务变体）上的平均成功率也比PerAct高出26%。RVT在RLBench上88.9%的任务中优于PerAct，同时推理速度是PerAct的2.3倍（11.6 vs 4.9 fps）。此外，我们发现RVT在现实世界中同样表现出色，仅需51个演示，单个RVT模型即可学习执行各种操作任务（5个任务，13个变体），如打开抽屉、将物体放在架子上、按压洗手液和堆叠物体（见图4）。

items.en: At its core, RVT is a view-based method that leverages the transformer architecture. It jointly attends over multiple views of the scene and aggregates information across the views. It then produces view-wise heatmaps and features that are used to predict robot end-effector pose. We extensively explore the design of the multi-view architecture and report several useful findings. For example, we observe a better performance when enforcing the transformer to first attend over patches within the same image before concatenating the patches for joint attention.
items.zh: RVT的核心是一种基于视图的方法，利用Transformer架构。它联合关注场景的多个视图，并跨视图聚合信息。然后生成视图级热图和特征，用于预测机器人末端执行器姿态。我们广泛探索了多视图架构的设计，并报告了几个有用的发现。例如，我们观察到，在连接所有图像块进行联合注意力之前，强制Transformer首先关注同一图像内的图像块，可以获得更好的性能。

items.en: Another key innovation is that, unlike prior view-based methods, we decouple the camera images from the images fed to the transformer, by re-rendering the images from virtual views. This allows us to control the rendering process and leads to several benefits. For example, we can re-render from viewpoints that are useful for the task (e.g., directly above the table) while not being restricted by real-world physical constraints. Also, since the multi-view input to RVT is obtained via re-rendering, we can use RVT even with a single sensor camera – as done in our real-world experiments.
items.zh: 另一个关键创新是，与之前的基于视图的方法不同，我们通过从虚拟视图重新渲染图像，将相机图像与输入到Transformer的图像解耦。这使我们能够控制渲染过程，并带来若干好处。例如，我们可以从对任务有用的视角（例如，桌子正上方）重新渲染，而不受现实世界物理约束的限制。此外，由于RVT的多视图输入是通过重新渲染获得的，即使只有一个传感器相机，我们也可以使用RVT——正如我们在现实世界实验中所做的那样。

items.en: To summarize, our contributions are threefold: first, we propose RVT, a multi-view transformer for 3D object manipulation that is accurate and scalable; second, we investigate various design choices for the multi-view transformer that lead to better object manipulation performance; and finally, we present an empirical study for multi-task object manipulation in simulation and the real world.
items.zh: 总之，我们的贡献有三点：首先，我们提出了RVT，一种用于3D物体操作的多视图Transformer，既准确又具有可扩展性；其次，我们研究了多视图Transformer的各种设计选择，这些选择带来了更好的物体操作性能；最后，我们在仿真和现实世界中进行了多任务物体操作的实证研究。

items.en: Vision-based Object Manipulation. The learning of robotic control policy has been traditionally studied with low-dimensional state observations [9, 10, 11, 12, 13]. Recently, vision-based policies [14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 20, 21] have gained increasing attention since the high-dimensional visual sensory input provides more generalizable observation representation across tasks and is more accessible in real-world perception systems. Various forms of visual input have been explored. Prior work has directly encoded the RGB images into a low-dimensional latent space and relied on model-based [22, 23] or model-free [24, 25] reinforcement learning (RL) to train policies to operate in this space. More recently, RT-1 [26] infers the robot’s actions from a history of images by leveraging transformer architectures [27]. Our proposed RVT also uses a transformer to predict actions, however, unlike RT-1, we additionally leverage depth to construct a multi-view scene representation. The use of depth input has also been extensively studied. Methods like CLIPort [3] and IFOR [1] directly process the RGB-D images for object manipulation, and hence are limited to simple pick-and-place tasks in 2D top-down settings. To overcome this issue, explicit 3D representations such as point clouds have been utilized. C2F-ARM [5] and PerAct [6] voxelize the point clouds and use a 3D convolutional network as the backbone for control inference. However, high-precision tasks typically require high resolution of voxelization, resulting in high memory consumption and slow training. Our approach falls into this category but addresses the scalability issue by transforming the point cloud into a set of RGB-D images from multiple views. We show that this significantly improves memory footprint and training efficiency, and leads to higher performance when compared to directly working with RGB(-D) or point cloud input (see Table. 1). Another relevant work is MIRA [28], which also uses novel view images to represent the 3D scene for action inference. MIRA achieves this by implicitly constructing a neural radiance field representation (NeRF) of the scene from a set of RGB images and then generating novel view images from the optimized NeRF model. However, the requirement of optimizing a scene NeRF model slows down the inference speed at test time and relies on RGB images from a dense set of views as input. In contrast, our approach can achieve significantly faster inference speed and can work with even a single-view RGB image.
items.zh: 基于视觉的物体操作。机器人控制策略的学习传统上使用低维状态观测进行研究[9, 10, 11, 12, 13]。近年来，基于视觉的策略[14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 20, 21]越来越受到关注，因为高维视觉感官输入提供了跨任务更可泛化的观测表示，并且在现实世界感知系统中更易获取。研究者探索了各种形式的视觉输入。先前的工作直接将RGB图像编码为低维潜在空间，并依赖基于模型[22, 23]或无模型[24, 25]的强化学习（RL）来训练策略在该空间中操作。最近，RT-1[26]通过利用Transformer架构[27]从图像历史中推断机器人的动作。我们提出的RVT也使用Transformer来预测动作，但与RT-1不同，我们还利用深度信息构建多视图场景表示。深度输入的使用也得到了广泛研究。像CLIPort[3]和IFOR[1]这样的方法直接处理RGB-D图像进行物体操作，因此仅限于2D自上而下设置中的简单抓取放置任务。为了克服这个问题，研究者利用了显式3D表示，如点云。C2F-ARM[5]和PerAct[6]将点云体素化，并使用3D卷积网络作为控制推理的主干。然而，高精度任务通常需要高分辨率的体素化，导致高内存消耗和慢训练速度。我们的方法属于这一类，但通过将点云转换为来自多个视图的一组RGB-D图像来解决可扩展性问题。我们表明，与直接使用RGB(-D)或点云输入相比，这显著提高了内存占用和训练效率，并带来了更高的性能（见表1）。另一个相关工作MIRA[28]也使用新视图图像来表示3D场景以进行动作推理。MIRA通过从一组RGB图像隐式构建场景的神经辐射场表示（NeRF），然后从优化的NeRF模型生成新视图图像来实现这一点。然而，优化场景NeRF模型的要求减慢了测试时的推理速度，并且依赖于密集视图的RGB图像作为输入。相比之下，我们的方法可以实现显著更快的推理速度，并且可以仅使用单视图RGB图像工作。

items.en: Multi-Task Learning in Robotics. Learning a single model for many different tasks has been of particular interest to the robotics community recently. A large volume of work achieves the multi-task generalization by using a generalizable task or action representation such as object point cloud [18, 19], semantic segmentation and optical flow [1], and object-centric representation [29, 30]. However, the limited expressiveness of such representations constrains them to only generalize within a task category. Task parameterization [31, 32] and discrete task-dependent output layer [33, 34] approaches are investigated with reinforcement learning to learn policies for tasks in different categories. With the recent breakthrough in large language models, multi-task robot learning has been approached by using natural language to specify a broad range of tasks and learning the policy from large pre-collected datasets [35, 26, 36, 2, 37, 38, 39, 40, 41]. We are inspired by this success but propose to learn language-conditioned multi-task policies with a small demonstration dataset.
items.zh: 机器人中的多任务学习。学习一个模型完成许多不同任务最近引起了机器人社区的特别兴趣。大量工作通过使用可泛化的任务或动作表示（如物体点云[18, 19]、语义分割和光流[1]以及以物体为中心的表示[29, 30]）来实现多任务泛化。然而，这些表示的有限表达能力限制了它们只能在任务类别内泛化。研究者使用强化学习研究了任务参数化[31, 32]和离散任务相关输出层[33, 34]方法，以学习不同类别任务的策略。随着大型语言模型的最新突破，多任务机器人学习已通过使用自然语言指定广泛任务并从大型预收集数据集学习策略来实现[35, 26, 36, 2, 37, 38, 39, 40, 41]。我们受到这一成功的启发，但提出使用小型演示数据集学习语言条件化的多任务策略。

items.en: Transformers for Object Manipulation. The success of transformers in vision and NLP has led its way into robot learning [42, 43, 44, 17]. Especially in object manipulation, transformer-based models with an attention mechanism can be utilized to extract features from sensory inputs to improve policy learning [45, 46, 47, 48, 49]. Unlike most prior work, we do not use large datasets for training. RVT efficiently learns from a small set of demonstrations, handle multiple views as visual inputs, and fuses information from language goals to tackle multiple manipulation tasks.
items.zh: 用于物体操作的Transformer。Transformer在视觉和NLP中的成功已将其引入机器人学习[42, 43, 44, 17]。特别是在物体操作中，具有注意力机制的基于Transformer的模型可用于从感官输入中提取特征，以改进策略学习[45, 46, 47, 48, 49]。与大多数先前工作不同，我们不使用大型数据集进行训练。RVT从少量演示中高效学习，处理多个视图作为视觉输入，并融合来自语言目标的信息以处理多个操作任务。

items.en: Multi-View Networks in Computer Vision. Multi-view representations have been explored in various vision problems. For point cloud recognition, SimpleView [50] showed how a simple view-based method outperforms sophisticated point-based methods. Follow-up works like MVTN [51] and Voint cloud [52] have further improved upon SimpleView’s architecture. Multi-view representations have also been used for other problems like 3D visual grounding [53] and view synthesis [54]. Unlike them, we focus on the problem of predicting robot actions for object manipulation.
items.zh: 计算机视觉中的多视图网络。多视图表示已在各种视觉问题中得到探索。对于点云识别，SimpleView[50]展示了简单的基于视图的方法如何优于复杂的基于点的方法。后续工作如MVTN[51]和Voint cloud[52]进一步改进了SimpleView的架构。多视图表示也已用于其他问题，如3D视觉定位[53]和视图合成[54]。与它们不同，我们专注于预测机器人动作以进行物体操作的问题。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Overview of RVT. Given RGB-D from sensor(s), we first construct a point cloud of the scene. The point cloud is then used to produce virtual images around the robot workspace. The virtual images are fed to a multi-view transformer model to predict view-specific features, which are then combined to predict action in 3D.
items.capZh: 图2：RVT概述。给定来自传感器的RGB-D，我们首先构建场景的点云。然后使用点云在机器人工作空间周围生成虚拟图像。虚拟图像被输入到多视图Transformer模型中，以预测视图特定的特征，然后组合这些特征以预测3D动作。

items.en: Our goal is to learn a single model that can complete a wide range of manipulation tasks. The input consists of (1) a language description of the task, (2) the current visual state (from RGB-D camera(s)), and (3) the current gripper state (open or closed). The model should predict an action, specified by a target end-effector pose and gripper state at the next key-frame. The key-frames represent important or bottleneck steps of the gripper during the task execution [55], such as a pre-pick, grasp, or place pose. Given a target end effector pose, we assume a low-level motion planner and controller that can move the end effector to the target pose. To train the model, we assume a dataset 𝒟={D1,D2,⋯,Dn}𝒟subscript𝐷1subscript𝐷2⋯subscript𝐷𝑛\mathcal{D}=\{D_{1},D_{2},\cdots,D_{n}\} of n𝑛n expert demonstrations covering various tasks is given. Each demonstration Di=({o1​…​mii},{a1​…​mii},li)subscript𝐷𝑖subscriptsuperscript𝑜𝑖1…subscript𝑚𝑖subscriptsuperscript𝑎𝑖1…subscript𝑚𝑖subscript𝑙𝑖D_{i}=(\{o^{i}_{1...m_{i}}\},\{a^{i}_{1...m_{i}}\},l_{i}) is a successful roll-out of length misubscript𝑚𝑖m_{i}, where lisubscript𝑙𝑖l_{i} is the language description of the task, {o1i,o2i,…,omii}subscriptsuperscript𝑜𝑖1subscriptsuperscript𝑜𝑖2…subscriptsuperscript𝑜𝑖subscript𝑚𝑖\{o^{i}_{1},o^{i}_{2},...,o^{i}_{m_{i}}\} is a sequence of the observations from RGB-D camera(s) with gripper state, and {a1i,a2i,…,amii}subscriptsuperscript𝑎𝑖1subscriptsuperscript𝑎𝑖2…subscriptsuperscript𝑎𝑖subscript𝑚𝑖\{a^{i}_{1},a^{i}_{2},...,a^{i}_{m_{i}}\} is the sequence of corresponding robot actions. This demonstration dataset can be used to train models with behavior cloning.
items.zh: 我们的目标是学习一个能够完成各种操作任务的单一模型。输入包括：（1）任务的语言描述，（2）当前视觉状态（来自RGB-D相机），以及（3）当前夹爪状态（打开或关闭）。模型应预测一个动作，由下一个关键帧的目标末端执行器姿态和夹爪状态指定。关键帧表示任务执行期间夹爪的重要或瓶颈步骤[55]，例如预抓取、抓取或放置姿态。给定目标末端执行器姿态，我们假设存在一个低级运动规划器和控制器，可以将末端执行器移动到目标姿态。为了训练模型，我们假设给定一个数据集𝒟={D1,D2,⋯,Dn}，包含覆盖各种任务的n个专家演示。每个演示Di=({o1…mii},{a1…mii},li)是一个长度为mi的成功轨迹，其中li是任务的语言描述，{o1i,o2i,…,omii}是来自RGB-D相机和夹爪状态的观测序列，{a1i,a2i,…,amii}是相应的机器人动作序列。该演示数据集可用于通过行为克隆训练模型。

items.en: Our proposed method (RVT) is a transformer model [27] that processes images re-rendered around the robot workspace, produces an output for each view, and then back-projects into 3D to predict gripper pose actions, as shown in Fig. 2.
items.zh: 我们提出的方法（RVT）是一个Transformer模型[27]，它处理在机器人工作空间周围重新渲染的图像，为每个视图生成输出，然后反投影到3D以预测夹爪姿态动作，如图2所示。

items.en: Rendering. The first step is the re-rendering of camera input. Given the RGB-D image(s) captured by one or multiple sensor cameras, we first reconstruct a point cloud of the scene. The point cloud is then re-rendered from a set of virtual viewpoints anchored in the space centered at the robot’s base (see Fig. 2 and Fig. 3). Specifically, for each view, we render three image maps with a total of 7 channels: (1) RGB (3 channels), (2) depth (1 channel), and (3) (x,y,z)𝑥𝑦𝑧(x,y,z) coordinates of the points in the world frame (3 channels). The (x,y,z)𝑥𝑦𝑧(x,y,z) coordinates help establish the correspondence of pixels across views, i.e., if pixels from different views share the same (x,y,z)𝑥𝑦𝑧(x,y,z), they correspond to the same point in 3D. We use PyTorch3D [56] for rendering. We empirically verify various design choices in our rendering pipeline (see Tab. 2 (left)).
items.zh: 渲染。第一步是相机输入的重新渲染。给定由一个或多个传感器相机捕获的RGB-D图像，我们首先重建场景的点云。然后从一组锚定在机器人基座中心空间的虚拟视点重新渲染点云（见图2和图3）。具体来说，对于每个视图，我们渲染三个图像映射，共7个通道：（1）RGB（3通道），（2）深度（1通道），以及（3）世界坐标系中点的(x,y,z)坐标（3通道）。(x,y,z)坐标有助于建立跨视图像素的对应关系，即如果来自不同视图的像素共享相同的(x,y,z)，则它们对应于3D中的同一点。我们使用PyTorch3D[56]进行渲染。我们实证验证了渲染流程中的各种设计选择（见表2（左））。

items.en: The re-rendering process decouples the input images to the ones fed to the transformer. This offers several benefits such as: the ability to re-render at arbitrary and useful locations (e.g., directly above the table) while not being constrained by real-world camera placements; multi-view reasoning even with a single sensor camera; allowing the use of orthographic images instead of generally provided perspective ones; facilitating 3D point-cloud augmentations and enabling additional channels like point correspondence which are not natively presented in the sensor images. We empirically find that these contribute to achieving high performance with view-based networks (see Sec. 4.1).
items.zh: 重新渲染过程将输入图像与输入到Transformer的图像解耦。这提供了若干好处，例如：能够在任意且有用的位置（例如，桌子正上方）重新渲染，而不受现实世界相机放置的限制；即使只有一个传感器相机也能进行多视图推理；允许使用正交图像而不是通常提供的透视图像；便于3D点云增强，并启用传感器图像中原本不存在的额外通道，如点对应。我们通过实验发现，这些因素有助于基于视图的网络实现高性能（见第4.1节）。

items.en: Joint Transformer. The re-rendered images, the language description of the task, and the gripper state (open or close) are processed by a joint transformer model (see Fig. 5 in the appendix). For language, we use pretrained CLIP [57] embeddings (ResNet-50 variant), which provide one token for each word. For the virtual images, we break each of them into 20×20202020\times 20 patches and pass through a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) to produce image tokens, similar to ViT [58]. For the gripper state, similar to PerAct [6], we pass it through an MLP and concatenate it to the image tokens. We also add positional embeddings to all the image and language tokens to preserve the positional information.
items.zh: 联合Transformer。重新渲染的图像、任务的语言描述和夹爪状态（打开或关闭）由联合Transformer模型处理（见附录图5）。对于语言，我们使用预训练的CLIP[57]嵌入（ResNet-50变体），为每个单词提供一个token。对于虚拟图像，我们将每幅图像分割成20×20的图像块，并通过多层感知器（MLP）生成图像token，类似于ViT[58]。对于夹爪状态，类似于PerAct[6]，我们通过MLP处理并将其连接到图像token。我们还为所有图像和语言token添加位置嵌入，以保留位置信息。

items.en: Overall, RVT has eight self-attention layers. In the first four layers, an image token is only allowed to attend to other tokens from the same image. This biases the network to process individual images first before sharing information across images. We concatenate all the image tokens along with the language tokens afterward. In the last four layers, we allow the attention layers to propagate and accumulate information across different images and text. Finally, the image tokens are rearranged back to the original spatial configuration, resulting in the feature channels of each image.
items.zh: 总体而言，RVT有八个自注意力层。在前四层中，图像token只能关注来自同一图像的其他token。这促使网络在跨图像共享信息之前先处理单个图像。之后，我们将所有图像token与语言token连接起来。在最后四层中，我们允许注意力层在不同图像和文本之间传播和累积信息。最后，图像token被重新排列回原始空间配置，从而得到每个图像的特征通道。

items.en: Action Prediction. The model outputs an 8-dimensional action, including the 6-DoF target end effector pose (3-DoF for translation and 3-DoF for rotation), 1-DoF gripper state (open or close), and a binary indicator for whether to allow collision for the low-level motion planner (see [6] for details). For translation, we first predict a heatmap for each view from the per-image features from the joint transformer (as shown in Fig. 5 in the appendix). The heatmaps across different views are then back-projected to predict scores for a discretized set of 3D points that densely cover the robot workspace. Finally, the end effector translation is determined by the 3D point with the highest score. Note that this multi-view heatmap representation for translation prediction extends prior approaches in the 2D top-down view setting [4]. Hence, RVT inherits the benefit of superior sample efficiency by representing the visual input and action in the same spatial structure [4].
items.zh: 动作预测。模型输出一个8维动作，包括6自由度目标末端执行器位姿（3自由度平移和3自由度旋转）、1自由度夹爪状态（打开或关闭），以及一个二进制指示器，用于指示低级运动规划器是否允许碰撞（详见[6]）。对于平移，我们首先根据联合Transformer的每图像特征（如附录图5所示）为每个视图预测一个热力图。然后，不同视图的热力图被反投影，以预测密集覆盖机器人工作空间的离散化3D点的分数。最后，末端执行器平移由分数最高的3D点确定。注意，这种用于平移预测的多视图热力图表示扩展了先前在2D俯视图设置中的方法[4]。因此，RVT通过将视觉输入和动作表示在相同的空间结构中，继承了优越的样本效率优势[4]。

items.en: For end effector rotation, we follow PerAct to use the Euler angles representation, where each angle is discretized into bins of 5∘superscript55^{\circ} resolution. The gripper state and the motion planner collision indicator are represented as binary variables. To predict the rotations, gripper state, and collision indicator, we use global features (𝒢𝒢\mathcal{G}). The global features are a concatenation of (1) the sum of image features along the spatial dimensions, weighted by the predicted translation heatmap; and (2) the max-pooled image features along the spatial dimension. Specifically, let fisubscript𝑓𝑖f_{i} be the image feature and hisubscriptℎ𝑖h_{i} be the predicted translation heatmap for the i𝑖ith image. Then the global feature 𝒢𝒢\mathcal{G} is given by 𝒢=[ϕ​(f1⊙h1);⋯;ϕ​(fK⊙hK);ψ​(f1);⋯;ψ​(fK)]𝒢italic-ϕdirect-productsubscript𝑓1subscriptℎ1⋯italic-ϕdirect-productsubscript𝑓𝐾subscriptℎ𝐾𝜓subscript𝑓1⋯𝜓subscript𝑓𝐾\mathcal{G}=\left[\phi(f_{1}\odot h_{1});\cdots;\phi(f_{K}\odot h_{K});\psi(f_{1});\cdots;\psi(f_{K})\right], where K𝐾K is the number of images, ⊙direct-product\odot denotes element-wise multiplication, and ϕitalic-ϕ\phi and ψ𝜓\psi denote the sum and max-pooling over the height and width dimensions. The weighted sum operation provides higher weights to image locations near the predicted end effector position.
items.zh: 对于末端执行器旋转，我们遵循PerAct使用欧拉角表示，其中每个角度离散化为5°分辨率的区间。夹爪状态和运动规划器碰撞指示器表示为二进制变量。为了预测旋转、夹爪状态和碰撞指示器，我们使用全局特征（𝒢）。全局特征由以下两部分拼接而成：（1）沿空间维度的图像特征之和，由预测的平移热力图加权；（2）沿空间维度的最大池化图像特征。具体来说，令f_i为第i张图像的图像特征，h_i为预测的平移热力图。则全局特征𝒢由𝒢 = [φ(f_1 ⊙ h_1); ...; φ(f_K ⊙ h_K); ψ(f_1); ...; ψ(f_K)]给出，其中K是图像数量，⊙表示逐元素乘法，φ和ψ分别表示在高度和宽度维度上的求和与最大池化。加权求和操作为靠近预测末端执行器位置的图像位置提供更高的权重。

items.en: Loss Function. We train RVT using a mixture of losses. For heatmaps, we use the cross-entropy loss for each image. The ground truth is obtained by a truncated Gaussian distribution around the 2D projection of the ground-truth 3D location. For rotation, we use the cross-entropy loss for each of the Euler angles. We use binary classification loss for the gripper state and collision indicator.
items.zh: 损失函数。我们使用混合损失训练RVT。对于热力图，我们对每张图像使用交叉熵损失。真实值由围绕真实3D位置2D投影的截断高斯分布获得。对于旋转，我们对每个欧拉角使用交叉熵损失。我们对夹爪状态和碰撞指示器使用二分类损失。

items.en: Simulation Setup. We follow the simulation setup in PerAct [6], where CoppelaSim [59] is applied to simulate various RLBench [7] tasks. A Franka Panda robot with a parallel gripper is controlled to complete the tasks. We test on the same 181818 tasks as PerAct, including picking and placing, tool use, drawer opening, and high-accuracy peg insertions (see the appendix for a detailed specification of each task). Each task includes several variations specified by the associated language description. Such a wide range of tasks and intra-task variations requires the model to not just specialize in one specific skill but rather learn different skill categories. The visual observations are captured from four noiseless RGB-D cameras positioned at the front, left shoulder, right shoulder, and wrist with a resolution of 128×128128128128\times 128. To achieve the target gripper pose, we generate joint space actions by using the same sampling-based motion planner [60, 61] as in [5, 6].
items.zh: 仿真设置。我们遵循PerAct [6]中的仿真设置，其中使用CoppelaSim [59]模拟各种RLBench [7]任务。控制一个带有平行夹爪的Franka Panda机器人完成任务。我们在与PerAct相同的18个任务上进行测试，包括拾取和放置、工具使用、抽屉打开和高精度销钉插入（每个任务的详细规格见附录）。每个任务包括由相关语言描述指定的多个变体。如此广泛的任务和任务内变体要求模型不仅专门化于某一特定技能，而是学习不同的技能类别。视觉观测来自四个无噪声的RGB-D摄像头，分别位于前、左肩、右肩和手腕，分辨率为128×128。为了达到目标夹爪位姿，我们使用与[5,6]相同的基于采样的运动规划器[60,61]生成关节空间动作。

items.en: Baselines. We compare against the following three baselines: (1) Image-BC [2] is an image-to-action behavior cloning agent that predicts action based on the image observations from the sensor camera views. We compare with two variants with CNN and ViT vision encoders respectively. (2) C2F-ARM-BC [5] is a behavior cloning agent that converts the RGB-D images into multi-resolution voxels and predicts the next key-frame action using a coarse-to-fine scheme. (3) PerAct [6] is the state-of-the-art multi-task behavior cloning agent that encodes the RGB-D images into voxel grid patches and predicts discretized next key-frame action using the perceiver [8] transformer.
items.zh: 基线方法。我们与以下三种基线方法进行比较：（1）Image-BC [2]是一个图像到动作的行为克隆智能体，它基于传感器摄像头视图的图像观测预测动作。我们分别与使用CNN和ViT视觉编码器的两个变体进行比较。（2）C2F-ARM-BC [5]是一个行为克隆智能体，它将RGB-D图像转换为多分辨率体素，并使用粗到细方案预测下一个关键帧动作。（3）PerAct [6]是最先进的多任务行为克隆智能体，它将RGB-D图像编码为体素网格块，并使用感知器[8]Transformer预测离散化的下一个关键帧动作。

items.en: Training and Evaluation Details. Just like the baselines, we use the RLBench training dataset with 100100100 expert demonstrations per task (180018001800 demonstrations over all tasks). Similar to PerAct, we apply translation and rotation data augmentations. For translation, we randomly perturb the point clouds in the range [±0.125​m,±0.125​m,±0.125​m]plus-or-minus0.125𝑚plus-or-minus0.125𝑚plus-or-minus0.125𝑚\left[\raisebox{0.86108pt}{$\scriptstyle\pm~{}$}0.125m,\raisebox{0.86108pt}{$\scriptstyle\pm~{}$}0.125m,\raisebox{0.86108pt}{$\scriptstyle\pm~{}$}0.125m\right]. For rotation, we randomly rotate the point cloud around the z𝑧z-axis (vertical) in the range of ±45∘plus-or-minussuperscript45\raisebox{0.86108pt}{$\scriptstyle\pm~{}$}45^{\circ}. We train RVT for 100k steps, using the LAMB [62] optimizer as PerAct. We use a batch size of 24 and an initial learning rate of 2.4×10−42.4superscript1042.4\times 10^{-4}. We use cosine learning rate decay with warm-start for 2K steps.
items.zh: 训练和评估细节。与基线方法一样，我们使用RLBench训练数据集，每个任务包含100个专家演示（所有任务共1800个演示）。与PerAct类似，我们应用平移和旋转数据增强。对于平移，我们随机扰动点云，范围在[±0.125m, ±0.125m, ±0.125m]内。对于旋转，我们围绕z轴（垂直）随机旋转点云，范围在±45°内。我们训练RVT 100k步，使用LAMB [62]优化器，与PerAct相同。我们使用批量大小24和初始学习率2.4×10^{-4}。我们使用余弦学习率衰减，并预热2K步。

items.en: For Image-BC and C2F-ARM-BC, we adopt the evaluation results from [6] since their trained models have not been released. These results overestimate the performance of Image-BC and C2F-ARM-BC, as they select the best model for each of the 18 tasks independently based on the performance on validation sets. Hence, the reported performance does not reflect a single multi-task model. Nevertheless, these baselines still underperform both PerAct and RVT (see Tab. 1). For PerAct, we evaluate the final model released by Shridhar et al. [6]. We test our models (including the models in the ablation study, Tab. 2 (left)) and PerAct on the same 252525 variations for each task. Due to the randomness of the sampling-based motion planner, we run each model five times on the same 252525 variations for each task and report the average success rate and standard deviation in Tab. 1.
items.zh: 对于Image-BC和C2F-ARM-BC，我们采用[6]中的评估结果，因为它们的训练模型尚未发布。这些结果高估了Image-BC和C2F-ARM-BC的性能，因为它们基于验证集上的性能独立地为18个任务中的每个任务选择最佳模型。因此，报告的性能并不反映单个多任务模型。尽管如此，这些基线方法仍然不如PerAct和RVT（见表1）。对于PerAct，我们评估Shridhar等人[6]发布的最终模型。我们在每个任务的相同25个变体上测试我们的模型（包括消融研究中的模型，表2（左））和PerAct。由于基于采样的运动规划器的随机性，我们在每个任务的相同25个变体上运行每个模型五次，并在表1中报告平均成功率和标准差。

items.en: To fairly compare the training efficiency against PerAct, we train both PerAct and our model with the same GPU type (NVIDIA Tesla V100) and number of GPUs (8), as reported by Shridhar et al. [6]. We report the total training time for both models in Tab. 1 (“Training time”). We also evaluate the inference speed of PerAct and RVT models by running the prediction inferences for the same input data on the same GPU (NVIDIA RTX 3090).
items.zh: 为了公平比较与PerAct的训练效率，我们使用相同的GPU类型（NVIDIA Tesla V100）和GPU数量（8）训练PerAct和我们的模型，如Shridhar等人[6]所报告。我们在表1中报告两个模型的总训练时间（“训练时间”）。我们还通过在同一GPU（NVIDIA RTX 3090）上对相同输入数据运行预测推理来评估PerAct和RVT模型的推理速度。

items.en: Multi-Task Performance. Tab. 1 compares the performance between RVT and the baselines. We find that PerAct and RVT perform significantly better than the rest. Overall, RVT outperforms all baselines with the best rank and success rate when averaged across all tasks. It outperforms prior state-of-the-art methods, C2F-ARM, by 42 percentage points (213% relative improvement); and PerAct by 13 percentage points (26% relative improvement). RVT outperforms PerAct on 88.9%percent88.988.9\% (16/18) of the tasks. More remarkably, RVT trains 36X faster than PerAct for achieving the same performance (see Fig. 1). We also observe that at inference time, RVT is 2.3X faster than PerAct. These results demonstrate that RVT is both more accurate and scalable when compared to existing state-of-the-art voxel-based methods. More visualizations of the task setups and the model performance are also provided.1
items.zh: 多任务性能。表1比较了RVT与基线方法的性能。我们发现PerAct和RVT的性能显著优于其他方法。总体而言，RVT在所有任务上的平均排名和成功率均优于所有基线方法。它优于先前最先进的方法C2F-ARM，提高了42个百分点（相对改进213%）；优于PerAct，提高了13个百分点（相对改进26%）。RVT在88.9%（16/18）的任务上优于PerAct。更值得注意的是，RVT在达到相同性能时的训练速度比PerAct快36倍（见图1）。我们还观察到，在推理时，RVT比PerAct快2.3倍。这些结果表明，与现有的最先进的基于体素的方法相比，RVT既更准确又更具可扩展性。还提供了任务设置和模型性能的更多可视化。1

items.en: Ablation Study. We conduct ablation experiments to analyze different design choices of RVT: (a) the resolution of the rendered images (“Im. Res.” column in Tab. 2 (left)); (b) whether to include the correspondence information across rendered images (“View Corr.”); (c) whether to include the depth channel (“Dep. Ch.”); (d) whether to separately process the tokens of each image before jointly processing all tokens (“Sep. Proc.”); (e) the projection type for rendering—perspective or orthographic (“Proj. Type”); (f) whether to use rotation augmentation (“Rot. Aug.”); (g) the number of views and camera locations for re-rendering (“# of View” and “Cam. Loc.”); and (h) the benefit of using re-rendered images versus using real sensor camera images (“Real” for “Cam. Loc.”).
items.zh: 消融研究。我们进行消融实验以分析RVT的不同设计选择：（a）渲染图像的分辨率（表2（左）中的“Im. Res.”列）；（b）是否包含渲染图像之间的对应信息（“View Corr.”）；（c）是否包含深度通道（“Dep. Ch.”）；（d）是否在联合处理所有token之前单独处理每个图像的token（“Sep. Proc.”）；（e）渲染的投影类型——透视或正交（“Proj. Type”）；（f）是否使用旋转增强（“Rot. Aug.”）；（g）重新渲染的视图数量和摄像头位置（“# of View”和“Cam. Loc.”）；（h）使用重新渲染图像与使用真实传感器摄像头图像（“Cam. Loc.”的“Real”）的优势。

items.capEn: Figure 3: We evaluate RVT with various camera locations for re-rendering (a-d) and find that locations in (a) perform best. We also test various projection options (e-f) for rendering images and find that RVT works better with orthographic images.
items.capZh: 图3：我们评估了不同摄像头位置进行重新渲染的RVT（a-d），发现位置（a）表现最佳。我们还测试了用于渲染图像的各种投影选项（e-f），发现RVT在正交图像上效果更好。

items.en: Tab. 2 (left) summarizes the ablation experiment results. The same table along with the mean and standard deviation for each task can be found in the appendix Tab. 4. Below we discuss the findings:
items.zh: 表2（左）总结了消融实验结果。每个任务的均值和标准差可在附录表4中找到。下面我们讨论发现：

items.en: (a) As expected, virtual images rendered at higher resolution help as RVT with virtual image resolution 220 outperforms the one with 100.
items.zh: （a）正如预期，更高分辨率渲染的虚拟图像有助于RVT，因为分辨率为220的虚拟图像优于分辨率为100的。

items.en: (b) Adding correspondence information for points across different views helps (see Sec. 3). This is likely because the network need not learn to solve the correspondence problem and can predict more consistent heatmaps across views. Note that the view correspondence channel is not present in sensor images but is rendered along with RGB(D) images in RVT. (c) Adding the depth channel along with RGB channels helps, likely because it aids 3D reasoning.
items.zh: （b）添加不同视图间点的对应信息有帮助（见第3节）。这可能是因为网络无需学习解决对应问题，并且可以预测跨视图更一致的热力图。注意，视图对应通道在传感器图像中不存在，但在RVT中与RGB(D)图像一起渲染。（c）在RGB通道之外添加深度通道有帮助，可能是因为它有助于3D推理。

items.en: (d) Independently processing the tokens from a single image, before merging all the image tokens, helps. It is likely because this design expects the network to extract meaningful features for each image before reasoning over them jointly.
items.zh: （d）在合并所有图像token之前，独立处理单个图像的token有帮助。这可能是因为这种设计期望网络在联合推理之前为每个图像提取有意义的特征。

items.en: (e) Rendering images with orthographic projection performs better than rendering with perspective projection, for both the cube and real camera locations. We hypothesize that it is because orthographic projection preserves the shape and size of an object regardless of its distance from the camera (see Fig. 3 (e-f)). It also highlights the advantage of re-rendering, as real sensors generally render with perspective projections.
items.zh: （e）对于立方体和真实摄像头位置，使用正交投影渲染图像比使用透视投影效果更好。我们假设这是因为正交投影保留了物体的形状和大小，无论其与摄像头的距离如何（见图3（e-f））。这也突出了重新渲染的优势，因为真实传感器通常使用透视投影渲染。

items.en: (f) As expected, using 3D rotation augmentation in the point cloud before rendering helps. To take advantage of 3D augmentations, the re-rendering process is necessary.
items.zh: （f）正如预期，在渲染之前对点云使用3D旋转增强有帮助。为了利用3D增强，重新渲染过程是必要的。

items.en: (g) The model with 555 views around a cube (Fig. 3 (a)) performs the best followed by the one with 333 views (front, top, left) around a cube (Fig. 3 (b)). The single view model, where we predict the third coordinate as an offset like TransporterNet [4], performs substantially worse, calling for the need for multiple views for 3D manipulation. It also highlights the advantage of re-rendering as with re-rendering we can leverage multiple views even with a single sensor camera. We also empirically find that rotating the location of the cameras by 15∘superscript1515^{\circ} (see Fig. 3) with respect to the table (and robot) decreases performance. This could be likely because views aligned with the table and robot might be easier to reason with (e.g., overhead top view, aligned front view).
items.zh: （g）具有5个视图围绕立方体（图3（a））的模型表现最佳，其次是具有3个视图（前、顶、左）围绕立方体（图3（b））的模型。单视图模型（如TransporterNet [4]那样将第三坐标预测为偏移量）表现明显更差，这表明3D操作需要多个视图。这也突出了重新渲染的优势，因为通过重新渲染，即使只有一个传感器摄像头，我们也可以利用多个视图。我们还经验性地发现，将摄像头位置相对于桌子（和机器人）旋转15°（见图3）会降低性能。这可能是因为与桌子和机器人对齐的视图更容易推理（例如，俯视图、对齐的前视图）。

items.en: (h) RVT performs better with re-rendered images as compared to using sensor camera images (Tab. 2 (left), second last row). The sensor camera images are rendered with perspective projection (physical rendering process) and are not straightforward to apply 3D augmentations (e.g., rotation) without re-rendering. Also, the location of sensor cameras may be sub-optimal for 3D reasoning, e.g., the views are not axially aligned with the table or robot (see Fig. 3 (d)). All these factors contribute to RVT performing better with re-rendered images than with sensor camera images.
items.zh: （h）与使用传感器摄像头图像相比，RVT使用重新渲染的图像表现更好（表2（左），倒数第二行）。传感器摄像头图像使用透视投影（物理渲染过程）渲染，并且在不重新渲染的情况下不容易应用3D增强（例如旋转）。此外，传感器摄像头的位置可能对于3D推理不是最优的，例如，视图不与桌子或机器人轴向对齐（见图3（d））。所有这些因素都导致RVT使用重新渲染的图像比使用传感器摄像头图像表现更好。

items.en: Notably, one might consider rearranging the sensor cameras to match the re-rendering views in order to bypass re-rendering. However, this will void the gains from using orthographic projections, 3D augmentation, and adding correspondences. This also strictly requires a multi-camera setup (Fig. 3 (a)), which is more costly and less portable in the real world than using one sensor camera. Finally, we have briefly explored view selection and found an option that works well across tasks. Further optimization of views, including the sensor and re-rendered ones, is an interesting future direction.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，人们可能会考虑重新排列传感器摄像头以匹配重新渲染的视图，从而绕过重新渲染。然而，这将失去使用正交投影、3D增强和添加对应关系带来的收益。这也严格需要多摄像头设置（图3（a）），这在现实世界中比使用一个传感器摄像头更昂贵且便携性更差。最后，我们简要探索了视图选择，并找到了一个在任务中表现良好的选项。视图的进一步优化，包括传感器和重新渲染的视图，是一个有趣的未来方向。

items.en: We study the performance of RVT on real visual sensory data by training and testing the model on a real-world setup. See the attached videos111Videos are provided at https://robotic-view-transformer.github.io/. for more details about the setup and model performance.
items.zh: 我们通过在真实世界设置上训练和测试模型，研究了RVT在真实视觉感官数据上的性能。有关设置和模型性能的更多详细信息，请参见随附的视频111视频提供于https://robotic-view-transformer.github.io/。

items.en: Real World Setup. We experiment on a table-top setup using a statically mounted Franka Panda arm. The scene is perceived via an Azure Kinect (RGB-D) camera statically mounted in a third-person view. We calibrate the robot-camera extrinsics and transform the perceived point clouds to the robot base frame before passing into RVT. Given a target gripper pose from RVT, we use FrankaPy [63] to move the robot to the target with trajectory generation and feedback control.
items.zh: 真实世界设置。我们在一个桌面设置上使用静态安装的Franka Panda机械臂进行实验。场景通过静态安装在第三人称视角的Azure Kinect（RGB-D）相机感知。在将感知到的点云传入RVT之前，我们校准了机器人-相机外参，并将其转换到机器人基坐标系。给定RVT的目标夹爪位姿，我们使用FrankaPy [63]通过轨迹生成和反馈控制将机器人移动到目标位置。

items.en: Tasks. We adopt a total of 5 tasks similar to the ones in PerAct [6] (see Tab. 2 (right)): stack blocks, press sanitizer, put marker in mug/bowl, put object in drawer, put object in shelf. Each task can be instantiated with different variations defined by the language description. For example, for stack blocks, some variations could be “put yellow block on blue block” and “put blue block on red block”. Given a task and variation, we sample a scene by placing the task-related objects and a set of distractor objects on the table in a random configuration.
items.zh: 任务。我们采用了总共5个与PerAct [6]类似的任务（见表2（右））：堆叠方块、按压洗手液、将马克笔放入杯子/碗中、将物体放入抽屉、将物体放入架子。每个任务可以通过语言描述定义的不同变体来实例化。例如，对于堆叠方块，一些变体可能是“将黄色方块放在蓝色方块上”和“将蓝色方块放在红色方块上”。给定一个任务和变体，我们通过将任务相关物体和一组干扰物体以随机配置放置在桌子上来采样场景。

items.en: Data Collection. We first collect a dataset for training RVT through human demonstration. Given a sampled task and scene configuration, we ask the human demonstrator to specify a sequence of gripper target poses by kinesthetically moving the robot arm around. Once we have the target pose sequence, we reset the robot to the start pose, and then control it to sequentially move to each target pose following the specified order. We simultaneously record the RGB-D stream from the camera during the robot’s motion to the targets. This provides us with a dataset of RGB-D frames paired with target pose annotations. In total, we collected 51 demonstration sequences over all 5 tasks.
items.zh: 数据收集。我们首先通过人类演示收集用于训练RVT的数据集。给定一个采样的任务和场景配置，我们要求人类演示者通过动觉移动机械臂来指定一系列夹爪目标位姿。一旦我们有了目标位姿序列，我们将机器人重置到起始位姿，然后控制它按照指定顺序依次移动到每个目标位姿。在机器人向目标移动的过程中，我们同时记录来自相机的RGB-D流。这为我们提供了与目标位姿注释配对的RGB-D帧数据集。总共，我们在所有5个任务上收集了51个演示序列。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Examples of RVT in the real world. A single RVT model can perform multiple tasks (5 tasks, 13 variations) in the real world with just ∼similar-to\sim10 demonstrations per task.
items.capZh: 图4：RVT在真实世界中的示例。单个RVT模型可以在真实世界中执行多个任务（5个任务，13个变体），每个任务仅需约10次演示。

items.en: Results. We train on real-world data for 10K steps, with the same optimizer, batch size, and learning rate schedule as the simulation data. We report the results in Tab. 2 (right). Overall, RVT achieves high success rates for the stack block task (100%) and the press sanitizer task (80%). Even on longer horizon tasks such as putting objects in drawers and shelves (e.g., the robot has to first open the drawer/shelf and then pick up the object), our model achieves 50% success rates (see Fig. 4). We found RVT struggled with marker-related tasks, which is likely due to sparse and noisily sensed point clouds. We further divide the results into two sets: “+ markers” (full set) and “- markers”. Our model overall achieves an 82.5% success rate on non-marker tasks. The marker issue can potentially be addressed by attaching the camera to the gripper to capture point clouds at higher quality. Another possibility is to use zoom-in views similar to C2F-ARM [5].
items.zh: 结果。我们在真实世界数据上训练了10K步，使用与模拟数据相同的优化器、批量大小和学习率调度。结果报告在表2（右）中。总体而言，RVT在堆叠方块任务（100%）和按压洗手液任务（80%）上取得了高成功率。即使在更长视野的任务中，例如将物体放入抽屉和架子（例如，机器人必须首先打开抽屉/架子，然后拿起物体），我们的模型也达到了50%的成功率（见图4）。我们发现RVT在与马克笔相关的任务上表现不佳，这可能是由于点云稀疏且有噪声。我们进一步将结果分为两组：“+ markers”（完整集）和“- markers”。我们的模型在非马克笔任务上总体达到了82.5%的成功率。马克笔问题可能可以通过将相机安装在夹爪上以捕获更高质量的点云来解决。另一种可能性是使用类似于C2F-ARM [5]的放大视图。

items.en: We proposed RVT, a multi-view transformer model for 3D object manipulation. We found that RVT outperforms prior state-of-the-art models like PerAct and C2F-ARM on a variety of 3D manipulation tasks, while being more scalable and faster. We also found that RVT can work on real-world manipulation tasks with only a few demonstrations.
items.zh: 我们提出了RVT，一种用于3D物体操作的多视图Transformer模型。我们发现RVT在各种3D操作任务上优于先前的最先进模型，如PerAct和C2F-ARM，同时更具可扩展性和更快。我们还发现RVT仅需少量演示即可在真实世界操作任务中工作。

items.en: Although we found RVT to achieve state-of-the-art results, we identify some limitations that present exciting directions for future research. We briefly explore various view options and found an option that works well across tasks, but it would be exciting if view specification can be optimized or learned from data. Further, when compared to prior view-based methods, RVT (as well as explicit voxel-based methods like PerAct and C2F-ARM), requires the calibration of extrinsics from the camera to the robot base. It would be exciting to explore extensions that remove this constraint.
items.zh: 尽管我们发现RVT取得了最先进的结果，但我们识别出一些局限性，这些局限性为未来的研究提供了令人兴奋的方向。我们简要探索了各种视图选项，并找到了一个在任务中表现良好的选项，但如果视图规范可以从数据中优化或学习，那将令人兴奋。此外，与先前的基于视图的方法相比，RVT（以及像PerAct和C2F-ARM这样的显式体素方法）需要校准从相机到机器人基座的外参。探索消除这一约束的扩展将令人兴奋。
